name: BedJet
description: The `bedjet` component allows you to communicate with a BedJet V3 Climate Comfort Sleep System.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to dispatch status changes to child components. Defaults to `5s`. Each child component can decide whether to publish its own updated state on this interval, or use another (longer) update interval to throttle its own updates.

config_entries.label: Time ID
config_entries.description: The ID of a [Time](https://esphome.io/components/time/) which can be used to set the time on the BedJet device.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: BLE Client ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the BLE Client.
